description: Unmistakable North American seabird, this adult Brown Pelican, with brown body (with dark underwings in flight), white on head and front of neck, oversized dark bill with obvious pouch and yellow eye.   We watched bird who at first was perched, do pouch stretching and then take off to fly above lake then do plunge diving to successfully catch numerous fish, which sometimes took multiple efforts to swallow, with the fish seen "flopping" in the bird's pouch.
photographer: Photographer: John (Dan) Brooke, John (Dan) Brooke, John (Dan) Brooke
